repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-002-BLK-5D657C54
blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it

We need to obey user request. It's plain text, three lines. So final.
</think>

blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it
